title: Campaigns and Policy | Sir Geoffrey Clifton-Brown
text_excerpt: Campaigns and Policy | Sir Geoffrey Clifton-Brown Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Sir Geoffrey News In Parliament Public Accounts Committee Campaigns and Policy Gallery Contact Search Business Survey Toggle navigation Main navigation Home About Sir Geoffrey News In Parliament Public Accounts Committee Campaigns and Policy Gallery Contact Search Business Survey Campaigns and Policy Campaign groups often organise e-mail write-in campaigns to MPs. Here are some of Sir Geoffrey’s responses to these campaigns. Campaigns and Policy Consultation on Proposals to Prohibit Trail Hunting in England and Wales 28 April 2026 I have been contacted by many hundreds of constituents on the application of the Hunting Act 2004 and the Government’s proposals to impose a ban on trail hunting, which is lawful within that Act. WASPI Women 25 February 2026 After much delay, the Secretary of State for Work and Pensions gave a statement on 29th January 2026 reaffirming their decision to not compensate those impacted. Social Media ban for under-16s 26 January 2026 I have received many hundreds of emails regarding banning social media for under-16s. Planning and Infrastructure Bill - House of Lord's Amendments 19 November 2025 When these amendments returned to the House of Commons on the 13th of November, in the form of Lords amendments 38 and 40, the Government put down motions to disagree, meaning they did not support the amendments. Gaza 29 July 2025 My approach on this matter has been consistent. You may be interested to know that on the 10th June I raised this in the House of Commons. 2024 2022 2020 2018 2023 2021 2019 Sir Geoffrey Clifton-Brown MP House of Commons London, SW1A 0AA Tel: 020 7219 5147 Email: CLIFTONBROWNG@parliament.uk Contact Cotswold District: Blockley; Bourton Vale; Bourton Village; Campden & Vale; Chedworth & Churn Valley; Coln Valley; Ermin; Fosseridge; Moreton East; Moreton West; Northleach; Sandywell; Stow; The Rissingtons. Stroud District: Bisley; Hardwicke; Minchinhampton; Painswick & Upton. Tewkesbury Borough: Badgeworth; Brockworth East; Brockworth West; Churchdown Brookfield with Hucclecote; Churchdown St. John’s; Shurdington. Privacy Notice Cookies Copyright © 2026.
